reviews.comment:
Fui a balancear y alinear el auto, buena atención del personal, donde revisaron los 4 neumáticos. Les falta ser mas amables y simpáticos, para que uno los recomiende y tengan 5 estrellas.
Si aclaro que el sector de recepción (sector de cabra zas del taller) fueron amables y muy simpáticos.

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my car balanced and aligned. The staff was very helpful and checked all four tires. They need to be more friendly and helpful so that people will recommend them and give them 5 stars.

I should mention that the reception staff (the "goat-shaped" area of ​​the workshop) were very friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHcGVMbExnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente, rápido el servicio de Pre - VTV; jamás tuve un problema. La señorita que atiende en recepción del primer piso, excelente, siempre con una sonrisa y buenos tratos. No es la primera vez que uso el servicio. Nada para mejorar.

(Translated by Google)
The pre-vehicle inspection service was excellent and fast; I never had a problem. The young woman at reception on the first floor was excellent, always smiling and friendly. This isn't the first time I've used the service. Nothing to improve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHbHBhNzVnRRAB
